working_on: Primary scope: ADR collection (closes Phase 0): adr/README.md + ADRs 0001-0012 absorbing the 12 strong working commitments + ADRs 0013-0022 absorbing the 10 architectural decisions from design-reasoning.md; MISSION.md commitment cross-refs; CROSS_REFERENCES.md Phase 0->Phase 1 boundary check; design-reasoning.md retirement. Continuation scope (user-authorized post-primary-close): README staleness sweep + _archive/ decommission.
outcome_summary: Phase 0 closed. Primary work: 22 ADRs landed in adr/ (all Status: Accepted), authored at production quality (~500-800 words each, dense cross-reference graph), with adr/README.md indexing the collection. ADRs 0001-0012 absorb the 12 strong working commitments; ADRs 0013-0022 absorb 8 entries from the now-retired design-reasoning.md plus 2 decisions from the S-0001 plan conversation (0016 graph-construction-validation, 0022 periodic-health-checks). docs/MISSION.md commitment list carries inline ADR cross-refs; docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md Phase 0->Phase 1 boundary check marked verified-at-S-0003-close. tools/validate.py adr_status regex widened to accept the documented Nygard bold form (the original would have produced 22 false-positive soft-warns). design-reasoning.md retired (git rm). Continuation work (post-initial-close, same session ID): README.md staleness sweep — Foundation status flipped to closed; all (lands in S-NNNN) parentheticals dropped; repo map updated to include docs/entities.json, docs/mempalace.yaml, docs/prep-paideia-prompt-pack.md, tools/validate-history.jsonl, .claude/settings.json; ADR collection added to repo-map and Project History. _archive/ decommissioned: both pre-foundation seed JSONs git-rm'd (recoverable via git show pre-foundation-v0.0.0:...); _archive/ directory removed; docs/operations/session-shutdown-sequence.md 'Deprecated files' rewritten to absorption + delete with _archive/ as one-off escape hatch; docs/operations/escalation-criteria.md _archive/ worked-example generalized to the broader retirement-archival question. Both work batches passed validate.py with 0 hard-fails / 0 soft-warns. Decision narrative captured in MemPalace at wing=paideia, room=s0003-adr-collection (drawer_paideia_s0003-adr-collection_bb10001cc414a727cfac7077; appended with continuation note). Saved Auto-mode no-push-gating feedback to user memory. Three logical commits on the worktree branch from initial close + two continuation commits = five commits total for S-0003 (eager-claim, ADR batch, primary close, reopen, cleanup, final close = 6 actually). Next: S-0004 prompt-pack Session 9 (Engagement Depth Aggregation) opens Phase 1.
